mapper.sql: id, sale_code, base_model_code, base_model_name, base_model_image, base_model_price, base_model_desc, base_model_param, enable, sort, description, create_time, create_by, modify_time, modify_by, row_version, row_valid
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_sale_model_base_model t SET
t.base_model_name = #{baseModelName},
t.base_model_image = #{baseModelImage},
t.base_model_price = #{baseModelPrice},
t.base_model_desc = #{baseModelDesc},
t.base_model_param = #{baseModelParam},
t.enable = #{enable},
t.sort = #{sort},
t.modify_by = #{modifyBy},
t.row_version = t.row_version + 1, t.modify_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM vso_sale_model_base_model t WHERE t.id = #{value} AND t.row_valid = 1
SELECT FROM vso_sale_model_base_model t WHERE t.sale_code = #{saleCode} AND t.row_valid = 1 ORDER BY t.sort ASC, t.id ASC
